summary: Completed testing of ManoBank Employee Portal (Iteration 15). All features working correctly: employee login at /banco, dashboard at /banco/sistema with KPIs, tab navigation (Aperturas, Clientes, Préstamos, Tarjetas, Empleados), and unauthorized access protection.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login - Employee login with rrhh.milchollos@gmail.com works correctly
GET /api/manobank/admin/dashboard - Returns dashboard data with employee info and KPIs
Frontend: /banco login page loads correctly with ManoBank branding
Frontend: Login form accepts credentials and redirects to /banco/sistema
Frontend: Dashboard shows KPIs (Clientes, Cuentas, Depósitos, Préstamos)
Frontend: Employee name 'Ivan Rubio Cano' and role 'Director General' displayed in header
Frontend: Tab navigation works (Dashboard, Aperturas, Clientes, Préstamos, Tarjetas, Empleados)
Frontend: Unauthorized access to /banco/sistema redirects to /login
critical_code_review_comments: Employee login flow correctly implemented with checkAuth() to update AuthContext state
Dashboard API returns comprehensive stats: total_customers, total_accounts, total_employees, total_deposits, loans_volume
ProtectedRoute correctly blocks unauthorized access to /banco/sistema
Tab navigation properly fetches data from respective API endpoints
Employee role verification works - superadmin users get director-level access
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tests use existing user account

mocked_apis.banking_accounts: MOCKED - IBANs are generated, no real bank connections

context_for_next_testing_agent: ManoBank Employee Portal fully tested. Login at /banco with credentials rrhh.milchollos@gmail.com / ManoAdmin2025!. After login, redirects to /banco/sistema showing dashboard with KPIs. All admin tabs work: Dashboard, Aperturas (account requests), Clientes, Préstamos, Tarjetas, Empleados. Unauthorized access to /banco/sistema correctly redirects to /login. The 'body stream already read' bug mentioned in agent context has been fixed.
